posts.title: Brain-Inspired AI: 98.83% MNIST accuracy with real neuroscience
posts.content: I've created a brain-inspired AI system that models the human brain's structure and achieves 98.83% accuracy on MNIST. It includes 3,313+ neuronal subtypes, multiple brain regions, and biologically-inspired learning mechanisms. This is an attempt to bridge neuroscience and AI with a complete, working system.

posts.title: Building Brain-Inspired AI: From 3,313 Neurons to 98.83% Accuracy
posts.content:
Learn how I built a brain-inspired AI system that achieves 98.83% MNIST accuracy. We'll cover:

1. The neuroscience behind 3,313+ neuronal subtypes
2. Implementing brain regions (cortex, hippocampus, basal ganglia)
3. Biologically-inspired learning mechanisms
4. Training and evaluation on real data
5. Interactive visual interface for building models

This is a complete, working system, not just a demo!

posts.title: The Future of AI is Brain-Inspired: A Complete Implementation
posts.content: Traditional neural networks ignore decades of neuroscience research. I've built a brain-inspired AI system that incorporates real brain structure and function. Here's what I learned from implementing 3,313 neuronal subtypes, 6-layer cortical organization, and biologically-inspired learning mechanisms.

challenges.title: Beat the Brain: MNIST Challenge
challenges.description: Can you beat 98.83% MNIST accuracy using brain-inspired principles?
rules: Must incorporate at least 3 different neuron types

challenges.title: Neural Diversity Hackathon
challenges.description: Create the most diverse neural network using our framework

challenges.title: Explainable Brain AI Challenge
challenges.description: Make brain-inspired AI more interpretable and explainable
